heading: PROJECTS
description: Welcome to Anwesha's Portfolio, where the real project is engineering a digital world that feels a intuitive as nature itself. Click on the project titles to see what she's been building, and remember: In the world of code, every bug is just a feature waiting to be discovered!

projects.name: elixpo_chapter
projects.description: Co-Developer and Maintainer of the Elixpo Chapter Repository, a community-driven project that serves as a hub for resources, discussions, and collaborations related to cloud computing and open-source technologies. The repository includes a variety of tools, guides, and projects that empower developers to learn, share, and contribute to the world of cloud computing. With a focus on fostering a collaborative environment, the Elixpo Chapter Repository is a space where developers can connect, learn, and grow together in their cloud computing journey.
